summary: Frontend-only test of Polish (PL) language addition to ArtJoga landing page at desktop 1440x900. All three language buttons (lang-ru, lang-en, lang-pl) exist and function correctly. Clicking lang-pl translates the entire page to Polish, activates dark bg-ink styling on the PL button, and switching between RU/EN/PL updates nav, hero, contact form, and footer as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PL language fully verified. Key assertions all pass: nav-about=O nauczycielce, nav-why=Dlaczego ArtJoga, nav-contacts=Kontakt, header-book-button=Zapisz się, hero-book-button=Zapisz się, hero-learn-button=Dowiedz się więcej, hero paragraph contains 'ArtJoga to przestrzeń ciszy'. PL button gets 'bg-ink text-sand-50' classes when active; RU/EN buttons don't. Switching RU->EN->PL correctly changes nav-about between 'О преподавателе', 'About', 'O nauczycielce'. Contact form shows Imię/Telefon/Email/Wiadomość labels and 'Zapisz się' submit. Footer shows 'Telefon' label (not Russian 'Телефон') and 'KONTAKT' heading (uppercase via CSS). Screenshot captured confirms Polish rendering across header, form, and footer.
